mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals accelerating nominal household demand and near-term revenue upgrades for index constituents, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher subsequent SPX returns, with Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A material rise in unemployment signals weakening labor income and deteriorating earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 3-month prior level by more than 0.3pp
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment increases are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: When policy rates rise while consumer inflation is accelerating, discount-rate pressure dominates nominal growth benefits and compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its 6-month prior level by more than 0.25pp while CPIAUCSL 12-month inflation is rising
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with rising inflation
failure_condition: Reject if this joint tightening-inflation trigger has nonnegative average 60-day SPX excess returns or a negative-signal hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving operating leverage and cyclical earnings breadth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month INDPRO growth has Rank IC below 0.03 versus 60-day SPX returns across two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction-related earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 3-month prior level by more than 10%
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST drawdown triggers are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample instances.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation with a near-zero policy rate signals a negative real-rate shock and future policy reaction risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses above 4% while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not show lower 5-day SPX returns than non-triggered observations at p < 0.10 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll gains paired with falling unemployment confirm broad labor-market healing and rising aggregate income, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises by more than 500 thousand over 3 months while UNRATE falls by more than 0.3pp
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor-healing trigger produces average 20-day SPX returns below the unconditional sample average.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating real output growth signals stronger economy-wide cash-flow expectations and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above 3%
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth-above-threshold observations have a 60-day SPX positive-return frequency below the unconditional positive frequency.
